tool.name: Mac File Info
tool.description: Get detailed metadata about a file.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_file_metadata
Get detailed file metadata.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_file_metadata", "query": "{\"path\": \"/path/to/file\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- path: File path (required)

**Returns:** exists, isDirectory, sizeBytes, permissions, owner, createdDate, modifiedDate, contentType
